subject: refactor(debug): finish DEBUG_SYSTEM compliance — 3-method clipboard + structured ErrorBoundary details
body:
DebugPill.tsx:
- copyToClipboard now tries ClipboardItem Blob → writeText → textarea
  in order, matching the pattern's 3-method fallback. The Blob path
  handles contexts where writeText is blocked (some iframes, strict
  permission contexts); writeText is the standard path; the textarea
  fallback catches mobile PWA webviews where even the clipboard API
  is locked down.

ErrorBoundary.tsx:
- componentDidCatch now passes the error stack and React component
  stack as structured `details` on the debugLog entry instead of
  splicing the first stack line into the event string. A future
  remote reporter subscribing to debugLog (Sentry etc.) can pick
  these up cleanly without parsing free text.

Tags: debug, error-handling, clipboard
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
